qa_pairs.question: Is the SHARCNET license available for Ansys Rocky software, and if so, who can use it?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, the SHARCNET license includes Ansys Rocky software and is available for free to all Alliance researchers.

qa_pairs.question: Does Ansys Rocky support GPU-accelerated computing on Alliance systems?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, Ansys Rocky supports GPU-accelerated computing, although this functionality has not yet been tested or documented.

qa_pairs.question: Where can users find instructions for running Ansys Electronics Desktop (AnsysEDT) in graphical mode?
qa_pairs.answer: Information on how to run AnsysEDT in graphical mode can be found on a dedicated wiki page, accessible via the provided link.
